name: The Tidal Wolves
based_on: A Portland indie-folk quartet in the vein of Sons of the East / DeVotchKa — one-page, image-forward band sites with a sticky audio player, tour dates, and a merch shelf (Bandzoogle/Wix band-site pattern).
summary: A bold, full-bleed one-page site for an indie-folk band with a persistent bottom audio player, live tour dates, embedded music, a merch shelf, and a mailing-list signup.
sections: Full-bleed hero with band photo, logo, and latest-single tagline
Sticky bottom audio player streaming the new single
Music / discography with embedded streaming links (Spotify/Apple/Bandcamp)
Tour dates list with city, venue, date, and ticket buttons (with sold-out states)
Merch shelf (vinyl, tee, tote) with price and buy links
Booking & press contact with social links
setup_questions: What's your band name and genre, and the one-line vibe you want the hero to say?
What's your latest single or release, and where can people stream it (Spotify/Apple/Bandcamp links)?
List 3-5 upcoming shows (city, venue, date) — or say you have none yet and we'll show a 'tour TBA' state.
Give 2-3 merch items with names and prices, plus 3 song titles for the music section.
photo_terms: indie folk band performing on stage moody lighting
four piece band group portrait outdoors film grain
live concert crowd silhouette warm stage lights
vinyl record and band tee flat lay merch
